metadata.project_name: Lambda Hero + Features Sections + Hardware / Product Cards

profile.primary_purpose: Two stacked homepage sections: full-screen hero with animated background, followed by 4-item interactive accordion with isometric illustration

visual_language.typography: Display headings in Suisse Intl (sans), body/UI in Suisse Intl Mono (mono), pixel accent in apkarchivr21
visual_language.cta_style: Primary (off-white bg, black text, RGB chromatic aberration shadow) and secondary (ultraviolet bg, white text)

fonts.mono: Suisse Intl Mono — body text, buttons, item numbers
fonts.pixel: apkarchivr21 — used only in hero heading letter swap animation
fonts.note: All font files hosted on HubSpot CDN. @font-face declarations are in the CSS file

hero_section.layout: Full-viewport-height flex column, centered content, relative positioning for absolute background

background_animation.description: Animated canvas effect covering the full section — study the live site to identify the animation library and asset

eyebrow_text.style: Suisse Intl semibold, centered, ~1.25rem–1.5rem, color: shell (#E7E6D9), margin-bottom: 20px

font_swap_animation.description: Specific letters in the heading periodically swap to the pixel font on a timed loop — inspect the live site to understand the timing, states, and visual behaviour

cta_buttons.layout: flex row, gap: 18px, justify-content: center, margin-top: 50px

button_1.style: Primary — off-white (#E7E6D9) bg, black text, RGB chromatic aberration box-shadow, border-radius: 0

button_2.style: Secondary — ultraviolet (#6236F4) bg, white text, no box-shadow, border-radius: 0

section_heading.text: Built for AI. Ready for superintelligence.
section_heading.placement: Above the two-column grid, spanning the left 7 columns only

accordion.description: 4 numbered items. Item 01 open by default and locked (cannot be closed). Inspect the live site for the open/close transition approach and timing.
accordion.item_01_locked: Cannot be closed — clicking the open item does nothing

items.title: You bring models. We bring the compute.
items.body: Get complete AI factories integrating high-density power, liquid cooling, and NVIDIA GPUs into one system designed for peak AI performance.

items.title: Your supercomputer. Your rules.
items.body: Accelerate every stage of your AI lifecycle. Train foundation models and serve billions of tokens.

items.title: Orchestration, handled.
items.body: Run large-scale AI workloads without the operational burden. We manage your clusters so you can focus on innovation.

items.title: Experts included.
items.body: Co-engineer your workloads with the very people building the infrastructure behind the world's most advanced models.

illustration.visual_description: Isometric 3D box with 4 stacked layers: 'Purpose-built datacenters', 'AI infrastructure', 'Managed services', 'Co-engineering'. Right side: vertical labels 'AI DEVELOPERS', 'ENTERPRISE', 'SUPERINTELLIGENCE'. Dotted grid on each face. Corner highlights in cyan/purple/white.
illustration.reconstruction_note: Original is a canvas animation that advances frames on accordion click. Implement as a static SVG or image — it does not need to be animated.

hardware_section.layout: Full-width section with pure black background (#000000 — darker than the hero). Two-column title block at top, followed by a horizontal accordion of 4 product cards.

title_block.heading: The engines of superintelligence
title_block.heading_font: Suisse Intl, semibold, clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem), color: shell
title_block.body: Give your team the computational precision to train foundation models and serve inference at global scale.
title_block.body_font: Suisse Intl Mono, base size, color: shell
title_block.layout: Two columns at 768px+: heading left (~58%), body right (~42%). Body aligns to the top of the heading with a top padding offset.

horizontal_accordion.description: 4 product cards in a horizontal row. Clicking a card expands it — inspect the live site for the expand/collapse transition approach and timing.
horizontal_accordion.default_active: First card (NVIDIA VR200 NVL72) is active by default
horizontal_accordion.image_behaviour: Product image fills the card. Inactive cards render the image in grayscale  — active card shows full colour. Inspect the live site for the exact property.
horizontal_accordion.text_behaviour: Card title is always visible at the bottom. Description text is hidden on inactive cards and animates in on the active card — inspect the live site for the transition.
horizontal_accordion.mobile: Cards stack vertically on mobile. Full width, fixed minimum height. Description text always visible.

products.title: NVIDIA VR200 NVL72
products.description: Rack-scale systems optimized for agentic AI.

products.title: NVIDIA GB300 NVL72
products.description: Rack-scale systems optimized for AI reasoning

products.title: NVIDIA HGX B300
products.description: Peak performance per watt for the largest training runs
